objective: Extract the grove-core library crate from the grove binary (engine, ops, registry, fetch, ingest) and rewire the CLI to consume it via grove_core::.
key_changes: Scaffolded core/ crate grove-core (edition 2021): Cargo.toml with full engine deps (clap-free, serde derive) and src/lib.rs exposing pub mod engine/ops/registry/fetch/ingest.
Registered the new crate in the root workspace: Cargo.toml members ["cli"] -> ["core", "cli"].
git mv'd engine.rs/ops.rs/registry.rs/fetch.rs/ingest.rs from cli/src/ to core/src/ (history preserved); intra-core crate:: refs stayed valid with no edits.
Rewired main.rs: dropped 5 mod decls, kept mod init/mcp, added use grove_core::{ops, registry, fetch, ingest} (engine excluded per REVISION 1 to avoid clippy unused_imports).
Rewired mcp.rs and init.rs: use crate::{...} -> use grove_core::{...}.
Partitioned deps: cli/Cargo.toml gains grove-core path dep, keeps clap/serde/serde_json/ignore/anyhow; dropped tree-sitter/streaming-iterator/sha2/dirs/ureq (now core-only).
Regenerated Cargo.lock for the new grove-core package entry (offline).

Verified green: workspace build --locked; 134 tests pass (32 cli + 17 integ + 85 core); clippy -D warnings clean; cargo tree -p grove-core clap-free; binary still grove 0.1.11; 21 languages unchanged.
